name: EK Pilot
summary: EK Pilot is an aerial mission game based on a 3D flight engine. Control by tilting your head.
description: EK Pilot is an aerial mission game based on a 3D flight engine. Players take on the role of a fighter pilot, soaring through the skies and shooting down floating targets within 5 minutes.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
EK Pilot is an aerial mission game based on a 3D flight engine. Players take on the role of a fighter pilot, soaring through the skies and shooting down floating targets within 5 minutes.

### Usage / Controls

- Pitch: Tilt your head up/down to change altitude.
- Roll: Tilt your head left/right to turn.
- Touch to shoot targets.
- Touch swipe to change flight speed.

releases.notes: UI modification, game balance adjustment, mission addition

author: EUNG SOFT
